target datalayout = "p:32:32-p1:64:64"

define i1 @tautological19_subset2(i32 %A) {
  %C1 = and i32 %A, -4
  %C2 = and i32 %A, -3
  %D = icmp sgt i32 %C1, %C2
  ret i1 %D
}

; CHECK-LABEL: @smax_and_mask_subset1(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND2:%.*]] = and i8 [[X:%.*]], 3
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[AND2]]

  %and2 = and i8 %x, 3
  %val = call i8 @llvm.smax.i8(i8 %and1, i8 %and2)
  ret i8 %val
}

issue.title: Simplifications of `max/min (a & c0, a & c1)` under `(c0 & c1) == c1/c0`
issue.author: k-arrows
